ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key linking to the financial instrument */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the financial instrument on that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the financial instrument during the trading session */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the financial instrument during the trading session */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the financial instrument on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total trading volume of the financial instrument on that date */,
  "day_number" INTEGER /* Day number of the trading session in the given period */,
  "adjustment_factor" REAL /* Adjustment factor to account for stock splits and dividends */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the trading data was recorded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the prices are denominated */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the trading data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., live feed, historical data provider) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument (e.g., stock name or ticker) */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of financial instrument (e.g., Stock, Bond, ETF) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the financial instrument is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the financial instrument (e.g., Technology, Healthcare) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the financial instrument (e.g., Software, Pharmaceuticals) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the financial instrument */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the instrument details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed and salted password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the user account (true for active, false for inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
